common-base-service/src/main/java/edu/mi.general_idea: Migrate JPA criteria API imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions.
common-base-service/src/main/java/edu/mi.why_exists: Classes in javax.persistence.criteria are not available in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence.criteria does not exist'.
